title: BSE Odisha OAV Result 2026 – Board of Secondary Education, Odisha (BSE Odisha) Odisha Adarsha Vidyalaya (OAV) Entrance Exam

detail.title: BSE Odisha OAV Result 2026 – Board of Secondary Education, Odisha (BSE Odisha) Odisha Adarsha Vidyalaya (OAV) Entrance Exam
detail.short_info: BSE Odisha Result 2026 : Board of Secondary Education, Odisha Result 2026 has been released on bseodisha.nic.in. Here is the direct Link to check your OAV Results Online.

sections.heading: BSE Odisha OAV Result 2026 – Board of Secondary Education, Odisha (BSE Odisha) Odisha Adarsha Vidyalaya (OAV) Entrance Exam

content.text: BSE Odisha OAV Result 2026 has been released for the Odisha Adarsha Vidyalaya Entrance Test on the official portals of the Board of Secondary Education, Odisha (BSE Odisha).

sections.heading: BSE Odisha OAV Result 2026 – Latest Update

content.text: BSE Odisha OAV Result 2026 has been released on February 18, 2026 on the official result portals of the Board of Secondary Education, Odisha. Students can check OAV entrance exam result for Classes 6 to 9 online using roll number / registration number.

sections.heading: BSE Odisha OAV Result 2026 – Quick Overview

rows: Board of Secondary Education, Odisha (BSE Odisha)
Roll Number / Registration Number, sometimes date of birth as asked on the portal

content.text: Check BSE Odisha OAV Result 2026 – Click Here

links.text: Check BSE Odisha OAV Result 2026 – Click Here

sections.heading: BSE Odisha OAV Result 2026 Release Date

content.text: The Board of Secondary Education, Odisha has declared the OAV Result 2026 on February 18, 2026 for Classes 6 to 9 entrance admissions.
This date is as per official and major education news portals referencing BSE Odisha.

sections.heading: Direct Link to Check BSE Odisha OAV Result 2026
Official Websites for OAV Result 2026

content.text: Result is available only through official portals such as:

items: bseodisha.ac.in
oav.edu.in
orissaresults.nic.in

sections.heading: Steps to Access BSE Odisha OAV Result 2026 Online

items: Visit the official BSE Odisha result website – bseodisha.ac.in or orissaresults.nic.in.
On the home page, click on the “OAV Entrance Test Result 2026” / “OAVET & OMAVET Result 2026” link in the latest notifications or result section.
You will be redirected to the result login page or result link hosted on the official partner portal.
Enter your Roll Number / Registration Number and other asked details like date of birth.
Click on “Submit” or “View Result” to check your OAV entrance exam scorecard.
Download the scorecard PDF and take a printout for counselling and admission purposes.

sections.heading: How to Download BSE Odisha OAV Result 2026 (Step-by-Step Guide)

items: Open the browser on mobile or desktop and go to the official BSE Odisha website (bseodisha.ac.in).
Click on the “Results” section or “Result of OAVET–2026 and OMAVET–2026” notice.
On the result page, click on the OAV Entrance Exam Result 2026 link for your class (Class 6 / lateral entry).
Enter student Roll Number / Registration Number and other required credentials in the login box.
Verify details and click on the “Download” or “Submit” button.
The OAV Result 2026 scorecard will appear on the screen; save the PDF and print it for future admission formalities.

sections.heading: Details Mentioned on OAV Result 2026 Scorecard

content.text: Explain the typical information printed on the scorecard, based on previous years and portals:

items: Student Name.
Roll Number / Registration Number.
Father’s / Mother’s Name (if visible on the card).
Category (SC / ST / OBC / General / others).
Class applied for (Class 6 / 7 / 8 / 9).
Subject-wise marks or section-wise scores, if provided.
Total marks obtained.
Qualifying Status (Qualified / Not Qualified).
Rank or position, if rank-based merit is displayed for specific categories.

content.text: Mention that the exact fields depend on the official format issued by BSE Odisha.

sections.heading: BSE Odisha OAV Cut Off Marks 2026
Official Cut Off (If Published)

content.text: Clarify whether category-wise cut-off is officially notified along with the result or through separate notice/merit list. If official cut-off PDF is available, guide users to download it from the same result portal / notification section. Do not invent numbers; if numbers are not officially released, say that only general trends are known.

sections.heading: Factors Affecting OAV Cut Off 2026

content.text: Without giving fake numbers, explain the determinants:

items: Difficulty level of the OAV Entrance Test 2026.
Total number of candidates who appeared in the exam.
Total number of seats available in Odisha Adarsha Vidyalayas and OMAVs.
Reservation rules and category-wise seat distribution.
Past year cut-off trends (without quoting unofficial figures as confirmed).

content.text: You can add a note that candidates scoring above the official cut-off and appearing in the merit list are usually called for counselling/admission.

sections.heading: OAV Merit List 2026
OAV Merit List PDF Download

content.text: BSE Odisha publishes a merit list / selection list PDF along with or after the result for selected students.
Guide users to:

items: Visit bseodisha.ac.in or district-wise OAV portals.
Click on “OAV Selection List / Merit List 2026” notification.
Download district-wise / school-wise PDF.

sections.heading: Tie-Breaking Rules (If Officially Mentioned)

content.text: Candidates should refer to the official OAV prospectus / notification for exact tie-breaking rules applicable for 2026 admissions.

sections.heading: What After BSE Odisha OAV Result 2026?

content.text: This is where you add genuine guidance. Explain typical sequence:

items: Shortlisting for counselling / admission based on merit list and cut-off.
Publication of school-wise selection lists by OAVs / district authorities.
Document verification at allotted Odisha Adarsha Vidyalaya within the specified schedule.

Submission of required documents: admit card, result printout, birth certificate, caste certificate, residence proof, passport-size photographs, etc. (mention as “generally required as per official instructions”).
Final admission confirmation and reporting to the allotted school on the given date.

content.text: You can add a short checklist-style bullet list for parents on how to prepare for admission day (keeping original documents, photocopies, result printout, etc.).

sections.heading: Important Links for BSE Odisha OAV Result 2026
